items.claim: King Green has a significant experience advantage that allows him to take over fights after the first minute.
items.quote: after that he's going to take over because he has got a lot of experience

items.claim: Loen Kevana possesses elite speed in his combinations and kicks.
items.quote: The combinations and the speed that we always see from him, it was ridiculous

items.claim: Loen Kevana has a defensive vulnerability to left hooks.
items.quote: he got clipped off that left hook by Charles Johnson and knocked out

items.claim: Brandon Royval is highly durable and tough.
items.quote: Brandon Royval ain't no moppet, ain't no slouch, and he is as tough as they come.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen possesses superior reach, range, footwork, and fight IQ compared to Marlon Vera.
items.quote: I think he's got the reach and the range, he's got the footwork and he's got the fight IQ.

items.claim: Marlon Vera is susceptible to being out-wrestled by high-level grapplers.
items.quote: He did okay stopping some of the takedowns but eventually was out wrestled.
